reference: Alright. My current girlfriend and I had unprotected sex on the 25th of April. Twelve hours and thirty minutes after it happened, she took the Plan B pill. Her last period occurred on the 5th of April, so we expect her period on the 3rd of May. She has experienced light cramps and today a bit of spotting. She described the blood as having a brownish tint. I was just curious if this is a major sign that she is pregnant or a normal side effect of the Plan B pill. We are slightly worried that it could have been implantation bleeding.
text: All right. My current girlfriend and I had unprotected sex on the 25th of April, 12 hours and 30 minutes after it happened. She took the Plan B pill. Her last period occurred on the 5th of April, so we expect her period on the 3rd of May. She has experienced light cramps and today a bit of spotting. She described the blood as having a brownish tint. I was just curious if this is a major sign that she is pregnant or a normal side effect of the Plan B pill. We are slightly worried that it could have been implantation bleeding.
